## Summary

Describe the problem, the chosen design, and the observable behavior change.

## Verification

- [ ] Complete credential-free pytest suite passes.
- [ ] Relevant TypeScript tests, typechecks, and builds pass.
- [ ] Release audit reports no findings.
- [ ] No credentials, account data, private alpha expressions, research recipes, or run outputs are included.
- [ ] Live simulation or submission changes include disabled-path tests with zero network mutation.

## Contracts

List any changed schemas, engine operations, MCP tools, output artifacts, or migration requirements.
